trigger_response_chain_analysis.title: Trigger-Response Chain Analysis Dataset
trigger_response_chain_analysis.description: Complete mapping of situation-thought-feeling-action cycles for cognitive-behavioral analysis

chains.situation: Receiving a group chat message but not responding immediately
chains.automatic_thought: Everyone thinks I'm rude or ignoring them on purpose
chains.behavior: Avoid opening the chat, overthink response for hours
chains.consequence: Missed connection, increased isolation, rumination
chains.alternative_thought: People are busy too; a thoughtful reply later is better than a rushed one
chains.alternative_outcome: Responded calmly after 2 hours, conversation continued normally

chains.situation: Walking into a coffee shop alone
chains.automatic_thought: Everyone is staring at me and judging how I look
chains.behavior: Rushed to corner seat, avoided eye contact, left quickly
chains.consequence: Didn't enjoy coffee, reinforced fear of public spaces
chains.alternative_thought: Most people are focused on their own phones and drinks
chains.alternative_outcome: Ordered calmly, sat by window, observed others were absorbed in themselves

chains.situation: Being asked a question in a meeting
chains.automatic_thought: My answer will sound stupid and everyone will think I'm incompetent
chains.physiological_response: Throat closing, mind going blank, sweating
chains.behavior: Mumbled 'I don't know,' looked down, avoided speaking rest of meeting
chains.consequence: Boss followed up privately, felt ashamed for days
chains.alternative_thought: I was asked because my opinion matters; imperfect is okay
chains.alternative_outcome: Gave partial answer, colleague added to it, discussion continued

chains.automatic_thought: If it's not perfect, I'll fail completely and lose my job
chains.physiological_response: Chest tightness, insomnia, loss of appetite
chains.behavior: Procrastinated due to fear, then worked 14-hour marathon
chains.consequence: Exhaustion, subpar work due to rushing, burnout
chains.alternative_thought: Good enough on time is better than perfect late
chains.alternative_outcome: Submitted solid draft, received feedback, improved iteratively

chains.situation: Making a mistake in front of colleague
chains.automatic_thought: Now they know I'm a fraud and shouldn't be in this role
chains.physiological_response: Heat waves, nausea, desire to disappear
chains.behavior: Over-apologized, offered to do their work to compensate
chains.consequence: Colleague uncomfortable, own workload doubled, resentment built
chains.alternative_thought: Everyone makes mistakes; recovery matters more than perfection
chains.alternative_outcome: Acknowledged error, fixed it together, relationship strengthened

chains.automatic_thought: This is definitely a brain tumor, I'm going to die
chains.physiological_response: Hyperventilation, dizziness, Googling symptoms for hours
chains.behavior: ER visit at 2 AM, demanded CT scan, reassurance-seeking
chains.consequence: Medical bills, doctor frustration, reinforced anxiety cycle
chains.alternative_thought: Headaches have many causes; I've had 100 before that weren't serious
chains.alternative_outcome: Took pain reliever, rested, headache gone by morning

chains.automatic_thought: I'm having a heart attack, something is seriously wrong
chains.behavior: Sat down immediately, avoided stairs for weeks
chains.consequence: Deconditioning, increased fitness anxiety, social withdrawal
chains.alternative_thought: Heart rate increases with exertion; that's normal physiology
chains.alternative_outcome: Continued activity, heart rate normalized, built confidence

chains.situation: Partner hasn't texted back in 3 hours
chains.automatic_thought: They're losing interest or cheating on me
chains.physiological_response: Stomach knots, checking phone every minute, irritability
chains.behavior: Sent 5 follow-up texts, accused them of neglect when they replied
chains.consequence: Partner felt suffocated, argument ensued, relationship strain
chains.alternative_thought: They're likely busy at work; we have plans tonight anyway
chains.alternative_outcome: Focused on own tasks, received text at lunch, evening went well

chains.automatic_thought: They don't actually like me, nobody wants to spend time with me
chains.behavior: Deleted their contact, posted vague sad message, withdrew from others
chains.consequence: Friend confused and hurt, support network weakened
chains.alternative_thought: Cancellations happen; their reason seemed genuine and apologetic
chains.alternative_outcome: Rescheduled for next week, used evening for self-care

chains.situation: Partner looking at their phone during dinner
chains.automatic_thought: They'd rather be anywhere but here with me
chains.physiological_response: Tension in jaw, loss of appetite, tearfulness
chains.behavior: Shut down emotionally, gave one-word answers, left table
chains.consequence: Partner confused, evening ruined, no resolution
chains.alternative_thought: They mentioned a work crisis earlier; this is probably that
chains.alternative_outcome: Asked if everything okay, they apologized, put phone away

chains.automatic_thought: I'm one emergency away from financial ruin
chains.physiological_response: Tight chest, doom scrolling expenses, insomnia
chains.behavior: Checked account 20 times, canceled necessary medical appointment
chains.consequence: Health issue worsened, missed early intervention window
chains.alternative_thought: I have savings and a stable job; I can handle surprises
chains.alternative_outcome: Reviewed budget once, kept appointment, felt in control

chains.situation: Hearing about layoffs at another company
chains.automatic_thought: My company is next, I'll lose everything, end up homeless
chains.physiological_response: Adrenaline surge, inability to focus, catastrophizing spiral
chains.behavior: Applied to 50 jobs in panic, told boss considering leaving (wasn't)
chains.consequence: Professional reputation damaged, unnecessary stress
chains.alternative_thought: Different industry, my performance reviews are excellent
chains.alternative_outcome: Updated resume calmly, networked casually, kept perspective

chains.situation: Child is 10 minutes late coming home
chains.automatic_thought: They've been kidnapped or in a terrible accident
chains.physiological_response: Shaking, calling repeatedly, preparing to call police
chains.behavior: Drove to school, called all friends' parents, created scene
chains.consequence: Child embarrassed, lost trust, anxiety modeled for them
chains.alternative_thought: Traffic is bad; they're 16 and responsible
chains.alternative_outcome: Texted once, started dinner, they arrived with valid reason

chains.situation: Feeling slightly dizzy in grocery store
chains.automatic_thought: I'm going to faint here, everyone will stare, I'll be humiliated
chains.physiological_response: Hyperventilation, tunnel vision, urge to flee
chains.behavior: Abandoned cart, ran to car, drove home shaking, avoided store for months
chains.consequence: Limited food options, reinforced agoraphobia, shame
chains.alternative_thought: Dizzy could be hunger or standing up fast; it will pass
chains.alternative_outcome: Sat on bench, drank water, finished shopping slowly

chains.automatic_thought: Panic attack coming, I can't handle it, I need to escape
chains.behavior: Called ambulance, went to ER, took emergency benzo
chains.consequence: Medical bills, dependency fear, reinforced medical anxiety
chains.alternative_thought: This is anxiety, not dangerous; I've survived 100 times
chains.alternative_outcome: Used grounding techniques, peaked and passed in 10 minutes

chains.situation: Touching a doorknob in public restroom
chains.automatic_thought: I'm contaminated with deadly germs, I'll spread disease to family
chains.behavior: Washed hands 50 times, avoided touching family, threw away clothes
chains.consequence: Bleeding hands, isolation, 3 hours lost to ritual
chains.alternative_thought: Normal germs exist; my immune system handles them daily
chains.alternative_outcome: Washed once normally, moved on, no illness occurred

chains.situation: Having a violent intrusive thought about loved one
chains.automatic_thought: Having this thought means I'm dangerous and might act on it
chains.behavior: Avoided loved one, sought reassurance, performed mental rituals
chains.consequence: Relationship distance, exhaustion, reinforced OCD cycle
chains.alternative_thought: Thoughts are not actions; this is OCD, not reality
chains.alternative_outcome: Acknowledged thought, let it pass, continued normal interaction

chains.automatic_thought: I'm back there, it's happening again, I'm not safe
chains.physiological_response: Full flashback, dissociation, survival mode activation
chains.behavior: Dove under table, screamed, fought off help, ran away
chains.consequence: Injury from fall, public scene, retraumatization
chains.alternative_thought: This is 2024, I'm safe, that was a car, not gunfire
chains.alternative_outcome: Grounded with 5-4-3-2-1 technique, anxiety peaked and subsided

chains.automatic_thought: He's here, I need to get out now
chains.behavior: Fled building, hid in bathroom for an hour, missed important event
chains.consequence: Professional setback, isolation, trigger generalization
chains.alternative_thought: Many men wear this scent; it doesn't mean he's here
chains.alternative_outcome: Noticed smell, felt anxiety rise, used breathing, stayed present

chains.automatic_thought: What's the point? Nothing will get better anyway
chains.behavior: Stayed in bed until 2 PM, avoided all responsibilities
chains.consequence: Job warning, worsened mood, reinforced helplessness
chains.alternative_thought: Yesterday was hard but I managed one small task
chains.alternative_outcome: Got up for shower, celebrated small win, built momentum

chains.situation: Friend shares good news about promotion
chains.automatic_thought: Everyone is moving forward except me, I'm a failure
chains.behavior: Faked congratulations, ended call quickly, isolated for days
chains.consequence: Friend felt rejected, lost support, deepened depression
chains.alternative_thought: Their success doesn't diminish my worth; I'm on my own path
chains.alternative_outcome: Celebrated genuinely, felt inspired, reconnected with goals

chains.situation: Making a small error at work
chains.automatic_thought: I mess up everything, I'm worthless, should quit
chains.behavior: Called in sick next 3 days, avoided all tasks, ruminated
chains.consequence: Work piled up, performance review affected, isolation
chains.alternative_thought: One mistake among hundreds of good tasks; I'm human
chains.alternative_outcome: Fixed error, informed supervisor, moved on to next task

chains.situation: Driver cuts you off in traffic
chains.automatic_thought: They did that on purpose to disrespect me
chains.physiological_response: Adrenaline surge, face red, gripping wheel
chains.behavior: Tailgated, yelled, made obscene gesture, followed them
chains.consequence: Road rage incident, potential accident, legal trouble
chains.alternative_thought: Maybe they didn't see me, or have an emergency
chains.alternative_outcome: Took deep breath, let them go, arrived safely

chains.situation: Partner forgets to buy milk you asked for
chains.automatic_thought: They never listen to me, I don't matter to them
chains.behavior: Yelled, brought up past mistakes, silent treatment for days
chains.consequence: Partner defensive, cycle of resentment, no milk anyway
chains.alternative_thought: They forgot once; I've forgotten things too
chains.alternative_outcome: Asked if everything okay, went together, turned into nice outing

chains.situation: Email draft has one typo after sending
chains.automatic_thought: Now everyone will think I'm careless and unprofessional
chains.behavior: Sent correction email, then apology email, then explanation email
chains.consequence: Looked insecure, annoyed recipient, reinforced perfectionism
chains.alternative_thought: Everyone makes typos; the content matters more
chains.alternative_outcome: Noticed typo, laughed, moved on, no one mentioned it

chains.automatic_thought: I'm not good enough, I should just give up
chains.physiological_response: Tears, shutdown, inability to process words
chains.behavior: Quit project, avoided mentor, stopped trying new things
chains.consequence: Stunted growth, lost opportunity, fixed mindset
chains.alternative_thought: Feedback is how I improve; they believe I can do better
chains.alternative_outcome: Took notes, asked questions, implemented suggestions

chains.automatic_thought: They're just being nice/pitying me, don't really mean it
chains.behavior: Argued with compliment, insulted self, changed subject
chains.consequence: Complimenter uncomfortable, missed connection, reinforced negative self-view
chains.alternative_thought: They have no reason to lie; I can accept kindness
chains.alternative_outcome: Said thank you, felt warmth, conversation deepened

chains.situation: Being asked to lead a project
chains.automatic_thought: They must be desperate, I'll fail and disappoint everyone
chains.behavior: Declined opportunity, suggested 'more qualified' person
chains.consequence: Career stagnation, others advanced, reinforced incompetence belief
chains.alternative_thought: They asked because they see potential in me
chains.alternative_outcome: Accepted, asked for support, succeeded with team

chains.situation: Friend takes 2 hours to reply to text
chains.automatic_thought: They're done with me, finding reasons to pull away
chains.physiological_response: Anxiety spiral, checking phone obsessively, crying
chains.behavior: Sent 10 texts, called, showed up at their house uninvited
chains.consequence: Friend overwhelmed, actual distance created, self-fulfilling prophecy
chains.alternative_thought: They're at work; our friendship is secure
chains.alternative_outcome: Waited patiently, they replied at lunch, plans confirmed

chains.situation: Partner wants to spend evening alone
chains.automatic_thought: They don't love me anymore, preparing to leave
chains.behavior: Cried, begged them to stay, accused them of not caring
chains.consequence: Partner felt suffocated, genuine relationship strain
chains.alternative_thought: Healthy relationships include alone time; this is normal
chains.alternative_outcome: Wished them good time, enjoyed own evening, reunited happily

chains.automatic_thought: I've ruined everything, I'll gain 10 pounds immediately
chains.physiological_response: Stomach churning, urge to purge, self-loathing
chains.behavior: Forced vomiting, exercised 3 hours, restricted next 2 days
chains.consequence: Physical harm, binge-restrict cycle, isolation
chains.alternative_thought: One cookie is part of a balanced life; my body knows what to do
chains.alternative_outcome: Enjoyed cookie, continued normal eating, no compensation

chains.situation: Seeing number on scale go up 1 pound
chains.automatic_thought: I'm disgusting, out of control, need to punish myself
chains.behavior: Threw out all food, water fast, body checking 50 times daily
chains.consequence: Medical instability, hospitalization risk, life disruption
chains.alternative_thought: Weight fluctuates daily; this is normal variation
chains.alternative_outcome: Noticed number, reminded self of normal fluctuation, ate breakfast

chains.automatic_thought: I need a drink to unwind, I can't relax without it
chains.behavior: Stopped at liquor store, drank 4 drinks alone
chains.consequence: Hangover, missed morning meeting, tolerance increased
chains.alternative_thought: I've relaxed without alcohol before; I can try other ways
chains.alternative_outcome: Called friend, took walk, slept well, clear morning

chains.situation: Party where others are using drugs
chains.automatic_thought: Just once won't hurt, I can control it this time
chains.behavior: Used, lost control, binged, missed work next day
chains.consequence: Relapse, shame cycle, health risks, relationship damage
chains.alternative_thought: One is never one for me; my recovery comes first
chains.alternative_outcome: Left party early, called sponsor, woke up proud

chains.situation: Opening laptop to start important project
chains.automatic_thought: It's too big, I'll fail anyway, better to avoid it
chains.behavior: Watched 4 hours of videos, ordered delivery, felt worse
chains.consequence: Deadline panic, rushed work, self-criticism
chains.alternative_thought: I just need to start with one small section
chains.alternative_outcome: Worked 25 minutes, built momentum, finished early

chains.automatic_thought: Weekend is over, life is just work and misery
chains.behavior: Stayed up late dreading, unprepared Monday, called in sick
chains.consequence: Wasted Sunday, work backlog, reinforced avoidance
chains.alternative_thought: Monday is fresh start; I can prepare tonight
chains.alternative_outcome: Prepped Sunday evening, good sleep, confident Monday

chains.automatic_thought: Everyone has perfect lives except me, I'm failing at life
chains.behavior: Deleted own posts, stalked ex's profile, bought things can't afford
chains.consequence: Debt, decreased self-worth, social media addiction
chains.alternative_thought: People post highlights; I don't see their struggles
chains.alternative_outcome: Put phone down, listed own blessings, planned real activity

chains.automatic_thought: They'll judge my lack of success, I have nothing to show
chains.behavior: Declined, lied about being busy, stalked attendees online
chains.consequence: Missed reconnections, reinforced inadequacy, isolation
chains.alternative_thought: Success is subjective; I've grown in ways that matter to me
chains.alternative_outcome: Attended, reconnected authentically, no one asked about status

chains.automatic_thought: If I say something, they'll hate me and I'll have to move
chains.behavior: Cleaned silently, built resentment, exploded over small thing later
chains.consequence: Actual conflict worse, relationship damage, unfair burden
chains.alternative_thought: Reasonable requests are okay; we can solve this together
chains.alternative_outcome: Calm conversation, agreed on schedule, relationship improved

chains.automatic_thought: I can't send it back, they'll spit in my food or cause scene
chains.physiological_response: Stomach tightness, eating wrong food, discomfort
chains.behavior: Ate meal didn't want, paid full price, felt miserable
chains.consequence: Unsatisfied meal, reinforced passivity, wasted money
chains.alternative_thought: Mistakes happen; politely asking is normal and acceptable
chains.alternative_outcome: Politely mentioned error, got correct meal, enjoyed dinner

chains.automatic_thought: I'm fundamentally unlikable and unworthy of any position
chains.behavior: Withdrew all other applications, isolated, stopped trying
chains.consequence: Missed opportunities, depression, self-fulfilling failure
chains.alternative_thought: Not a fit for this role; doesn't define my worth
chains.alternative_outcome: Asked for feedback, applied elsewhere, got better fit position

chains.automatic_thought: I'm unlovable, too broken for anyone to want
chains.physiological_response: Chest pain, hopelessness, dating app deletion
chains.behavior: Texted begging for chance, then blocked them, then blamed self
chains.consequence: Humiliation, reinforced unlovable belief, dating avoidance
chains.alternative_thought: Compatibility is mutual; we both deserve right fit
chains.alternative_outcome: Wished them well, processed briefly, stayed open to others

chains.automatic_thought: Life is meaningless, we're all going to die, nothing matters
chains.behavior: Frantic Googling, woke partner, existential crisis
chains.consequence: Exhaustion, nihilism, functional impairment
chains.alternative_thought: Meaning is created through connection and experience
chains.alternative_outcome: Used grounding techniques, morning brought perspective

chains.automatic_thought: Time is running out, I've wasted my life, it's too late
chains.behavior: Impulsive career change, reckless decisions, depression
chains.consequence: Actual wasted time, financial instability, relationship strain
chains.alternative_thought: Life has chapters; this is just the beginning of a new one
chains.alternative_outcome: Reflected on growth, set intentional goals, celebrated survival

chains.automatic_thought: I'll be stranded, unsafe, unable to call for help
chains.physiological_response: Urgency, charger seeking, inability to focus
chains.behavior: Rushed home, canceled plans, bought 3 portable chargers
chains.consequence: Limited experiences, dependency, anxiety reinforcement
chains.alternative_thought: I've managed before; there are chargers everywhere
chains.alternative_outcome: Noticed battery, put in low power mode, charged at destination

chains.automatic_thought: It's an emergency, I must respond immediately or lose job
chains.physiological_response: Heart racing, immediate checking, cortisol spike
chains.behavior: Read email, replied, couldn't sleep, resentment built
chains.consequence: Boundary erosion, burnout, sleep deprivation
chains.alternative_thought: Unless it says URGENT, it can wait until morning
chains.alternative_outcome: Ignored until morning, was routine email, good sleep

chains.automatic_thought: The world is ending, there's no hope, why bother with anything
chains.behavior: Doom scrolled for hours, skipped work, existential paralysis
chains.consequence: Depression, inaction, despair
chains.alternative_thought: I can control my actions and contribution, even if not the world
chains.alternative_outcome: Donated to relief, limited news, focused on local community

chains.automatic_thought: It would be cruel to bring a child into this dying world
chains.behavior: Avoided conversation, researched doomsday prep, isolated
chains.consequence: Relationship damage, life plan suspended, despair
chains.alternative_thought: Future generations can be part of solutions; hope exists
chains.alternative_outcome: Discussed fears with partner, joined climate group, felt empowered

chains.situation: Asked 'What do you do?' at party
chains.automatic_thought: My job defines my worth, and it's not impressive enough
chains.behavior: Gave vague answer, avoided follow-up, left early
chains.consequence: Missed connections, reinforced career dissatisfaction
chains.alternative_thought: I am more than my job; my values and relationships define me
chains.alternative_outcome: Answered honestly, asked about their passions, genuine connection

chains.automatic_thought: I don't know who I am without this role, I'm lost
chains.behavior: Clung to old patterns, avoided processing, numbed with distractions
chains.consequence: Delayed adaptation, depression, missed growth opportunity
chains.alternative_thought: This is a metamorphosis; I get to discover new aspects of myself
chains.alternative_outcome: Embraced uncertainty, explored new interests, rebuilt identity

cognitive_distortions_reference.Mind Reading: Assuming you know what others think without evidence
cognitive_distortions_reference.All-or-Nothing: Viewing situations in black and white categories
cognitive_distortions_reference.Overgeneralization: Making broad conclusions from single events
cognitive_distortions_reference.Labeling: Assigning global negative labels to self

therapeutic_applications.cbt: Identify â†’ Challenge â†’ Reframe â†’ Behavioral Experiment
therapeutic_applications.act: Accept thoughts, commit to values-based action
therapeutic_applications.exposure: Gradual approach to feared situations to disconfirm predictions

title: Trigger-Response Chain Analysis
description: Log trigger, thought, emotion, behavior and outcome to break unhealthy response cycles.

questions.question: Long-term impact
questions.placeholder: How this pattern affects you over time...
